uiSurfaces: Purchase economics card: Last Purchase, Procurement Cost, Operational Cost
Matched invoice product usable quantity label (normalizedUsableQuantityLabel)

classificationRules.A: UI contradicts invoice reality or shows materially wrong economics/usable stock
classificationRules.B: Ambiguous interpretation; UI partially correct but misleading
classificationRules.C: Internal stored purchase_quantity may differ; displayed economics match invoice operational reality

realUserVisibleBugs: Mezzi paccheri mancini — usable 6 kg for 2 cases (should 12 kg)
Mozzarella fior di latte — usable 1 kg for 10 packs (should 10 kg)
Guanciale stagionato — usable 10.5 kg from *7 pack notation vs ~6 kg weight line
conclusion.familyANote: Ricotta trevigiana (Family A) shows correct UI economics; Mezzi paccheri (Family A) shows wrong usable quantity despite correct Last Purchase count.
conclusion.collapsePatternNote: 9 multi-unit collapse rows (Anchoas, Gema, Atum, Stracciatella, Mozzarella julienne) show correct Purchase economics card despite stored purchase_quantity=1; not user-visible bugs on detail page.
conclusion.packInnerCountNote: 8 pack-inner-count rows (Pomodori, S.Pellegrino×2, Paccheri, Peroni, Aceto, Rulo) show correct total/usable operational math; criterion-3 mismatch is internal only.

Last Purchase 24 un, usable 6 kg (24×250 g), operational €12.44/kg = €74.54÷6 kg.
Invoice 2 cases (12 kg). UI usable 6 kg (one case); operational €4.55/kg uses wrong denominator. Last Purchase 2 un contradicts 6 kg usable.
1 case → usable 15 kg (6×2.5 kg), operational €1.47/kg = €22.05÷15 kg.
Family A internal collapse (stored PQ=1) but UI shows Last Purchase 2 un, usable 3 kg, operational €2.66/kg = €7.97÷3 kg — all match invoice.
Invoice 24 bottles. UI usable 48 ml (parsed 0.20cl as 2 ml×24); operational €405/L is nonsensical vs ~€4/L for 24×20 cl.
Invoice ~6 kg at €10.83/kg (qty 5.996, total €64.93). UI usable 10.5 kg from *7 pack notation; operational €6.18/kg understates true €10.83/kg.
